author: Jordan Vasu
description: Bulk-link all unlinked mentions of the active note (and its aliases) across the vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jordan Vasu
manifest.description: Bulk-link all unlinked mentions of the active note (and its aliases) across the vault.
manifest.name: Link Unlinked Mentions

name: Link Unlinked Mentions

releases.author: jordanvasu
releases.description:
Initial release.

Adds a command and ribbon icon ("Link mentions of other notes in current note") that scans the active note for plain-text mentions of other notes' titles and aliases and converts them to wikilinks. Shows a dry-run preview before applying.

**Warning:** The operation modifies the active note. Back up your vault before running on important notes.

### Known limitations
- Does not currently work on back links, will add this functionality.
releases.name: v 0.1.0 linked-unlinked mentions
